use_codes.desc: USE OF REMIMAZOLAM FOR INDUCTION AND MAINTENANCE OF PROCEDURAL SEDATION IN ADULTS UNDERGOING PROCEDURES LASTING 30 MINUTES OR LESS

indications.text:
BYFAVO™ is indicated for the induction and maintenance of procedural sedation in adults
undergoing procedures lasting 30 minutes or less.

BYFAVO™ is indicated for the induction and maintenance of procedural sedation in adults
undergoing procedures lasting 30 minutes or less.

BYFAVO® is indicated for the induction and maintenance of procedural sedation in adults undergoing
procedures lasting 30 minutes or less.

undergoing procedures lasting 30 minutes or less.
